reviews.review_description: Low poly graphics but very immersive simulation. Every body part you hit has his damage percentage like in the real life, and the body torques in consequence. I have two headsets and I Wish to do a head to head duel, but when you enter the street duel mode, there Is no obvious mean to select an opponent  and you are apparently waiting for the First newcomer, whoever he is: no friend lists, no rooms, no selectable users. How can I play with a selectable user? This Is important! Many thanks in Advance for a reply!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review :)
Indeed, despite the low-poly graphics, Wanted is a simulation so very immersive.
Regarding multiplayer, you’re right for now, you can’t create a dedicated room, but we’re working on it.

reviews.review_title: Deep interactivity in a VR shootout
reviews.review_description:
Don't be misled by the simple visuals (I'm not a low poly fan) WANTED is made with real care. The design is tight, characters react differently depending on how you shoot them, and the animations feel alive and responsive.

It’s surprisingly interactive too. At one point, an NPC missed me and accidentally shot a bird out of the sky. The bird dropped with full ragdoll physics. Little touches like that show how much thought went into the game.

Aiming actually takes skill, and once you get into it, it puts you in a real flow state. Can’t wait to see how it evolves, especially with the upcoming multiplayer maps.

developer_response.body:
Happy to see that you have fun :)
Thank you for your review and feed back, it means a lot!

reviews.review_description: Graphics are like a poor mobile game and there is no gore whatsoever but it is actually very good for what it is I recommend giving it a shot
Fun game, I can't wait for more people to play it so I can play the multiplayer
I like that you press a button to pull the gun lever back before shooting.

developer_response.body:
🙏 Thanks for the comment 😊

I thought of the joystick as the hammer of the gun to get a real feel (you can also use the A button, but to be transparent I also use the joystick 🤠).

reviews.review_description: Just had the chance to dive into the latest update of "Wanted" for Meta Quest, and wow, it's a whole new level of awesome! The visuals? Sharper and more immersive. But the real game-changer? Multiplayer mode. It's not just an addition; it turns the whole experience up a notch. You can really see the progress they've made in both visuals and features. Dueling against friends (or rivals) adds that extra layer of thrill and strategy you didn't know you needed. As a regular gamer, I appreciate when updates bring something genuinely exciting to the table, and "Wanted" delivers. If you're into VR and looking for something that combines skill, strategy, and fun social interaction, this update is for you. Trust me, give it a shot, and you might just find your new VR obsession.

developer_response.body:
🙏 Thanks for the comment 😊

Very Kind from you!
